question_text: A student slides a box across a wooden floor. Which of the following best describes the direction of the friction force on the box?

options.label: A
options.text: In the same direction as the box is moving

options.label: B
options.text: Opposite to the direction the box is moving

explanation: Friction always opposes motion, so it acts in the opposite direction to the object's movement. This is why friction slows objects down.
